title: Net Material Flow
query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Count) FROM MaterialCollected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS collected, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Count) FROM MaterialDiscarded WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS discarded

details.text: {collected} material unit(s) gathered vs. {discarded} discarded during the report period. Net flow shows whether your gathering is outpacing your consumption — a high discard total relative to collection means you hit your inventory cap repeatedly and may have left valuable materials behind.
details.help: collected drives the title as the headline inflow. The discarded subquery provides the outflow for comparison.

tagLines: Material inventory flow balance compiled. Net accumulation rate noted in the engineering supply report.
In vs. out. Most commanders never check the balance. It tells you a lot about your gathering efficiency.
Materials accumulate until they hit the cap. What happens then shows your priorities.
